name: New England Potato Salad with Sour Cream Dres
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel potatoes and cut into 1/2 inch cubes. Chill.
2. Add celery, vinegar, and salt to the potato mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, fold eggs into sour cream.
4. To the same bowl, add remaining vinegar, pepper, mustard, garlic, and onion.
5. Place the potato mixture in a salad bowl.
6. Pour the dressing over the potatoes and toss well.
7. Garnish with olives.
